rule.name: Never skip mandatory steps
rule.description: Design approval (Step 2) and testing (Step 4) are required checkpoints that must be completed before proceeding.
rule.enforcement: Bob will ask for explicit approval before moving past mandatory checkpoints.

rule.name: Update todo list after each step
rule.description: Use the update_todo_list tool to track progress through the workflow.

rule.name: Ask for approval at mandatory checkpoints
rule.description: Before proceeding past Step 2 (Design) or Step 4 (Testing), explicitly ask the user for approval to continue.

rule.name: Document decisions throughout the process
rule.description: Keep a record of important decisions, trade-offs, and rationale at each step.

rule.name: Keep user informed of progress and blockers
rule.description: Proactively communicate status, potential issues, and next steps.

step_rules.name: Requirements Analysis
step_rules.rule: Ask clarifying questions to ensure complete understanding
Document all requirements in a structured format
Identify and document assumptions
Flag any ambiguous or conflicting requirements

step_rules.name: Design Solution
step_rules.rule: Create visual diagrams for complex architectures
Document design decisions and alternatives considered
Identify potential risks and mitigation strategies
Ensure design is reviewable and understandable
MANDATORY: Obtain explicit approval before implementation

step_rules.name: Implementation
step_rules.rule: Follow project coding standards and conventions
Write self-documenting code with clear names
Add comments for complex or non-obvious logic
Handle errors gracefully with appropriate messages
Keep commits small and focused

step_rules.name: Testing
step_rules.rule: Achieve minimum 80% code coverage with unit tests
Test both happy path and error scenarios
Include edge case testing
Verify performance meets requirements
MANDATORY: All tests must pass before proceeding

step_rules.name: Documentation
step_rules.rule: Update all affected documentation
Include code examples where appropriate
Document configuration changes
Update changelog with user-facing changes

step_rules.name: Code Review
step_rules.rule: Perform self-review before submitting
Write clear PR description with context
Respond to feedback constructively
Ensure CI/CD pipeline passes

step_rules.name: Deployment Preparation
step_rules.rule: Create detailed deployment plan
Document rollback procedure
Update monitoring and alerting
Communicate deployment schedule to stakeholders

standard.requirement: Functions should be small and focused (< 50 lines)
